            transition: max-height 0.3s ease-in-out, opacity 0.3s ease-in-out;
            max-height: 0;
            opacity: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .accordion-content.active {
            max-height: 200px; /* Adjust based on content */
            opacity: 1;
        }
        .chevron {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        .chevron.rotate {
            transform: rotate(180deg);
        }

                        { title: "وضع الخط الزمني (Timeline)", desc: "إنشاء خط زمني لتطور المفاهيم والأحداث التاريخية.", example: "رتب أحداث التاريخ الإسلامي المذكورة في الكتاب تلقائياً.", icon: "clock", color: "text-indigo-600" },
                        { title: "استخراج المخططات (Schema)", desc: "تحديد تلقائي للموضوعات والمفاهيم المتكررة لبناء هيكل معرفي.", example: "استخرج الجدول الدوري أو المعادلات الكيميائية كقائمة منفصلة.", icon: "search", color: "text-teal-600" },

                        { question: "كيف أضيف مصادر متعددة؟", answer: "يمكنك رفع ملفات PDF، نسخ نصوص، إضافة روابط Google Docs، أو حتى روابط فيديو يوتيوب وسيقوم هو بقراءتها." },
                        { question: "هل يمكن تصدير الملخصات؟", answer: "نعم، يمكنك نسخ النصوص أو تحويل الملاحظات إلى مستندات جوجل وتصديرها." }
                    ]
                },
                footer: {
                    desc: "هي شركة متخصصة في خدمات الذكاء الاصطناعي الشاملة والمتكاملة، مع تركيز خاص على اللغة العربية واحتياجات سوق الشرق الأوسط وشمال أفريقيا. تقدم الشركة مجموعة واسعة من الأدوات والحلول المدعومة بالذكاء الاصطناعي",
                    whatsapp: "تواصل معنا عبر واتساب",
                    twitter: "تابعنا على X (تويتر)",
                    email: "راسلنا عبر البريد الإلكتروني",
                    copyright: "© 2025 Midade.AI. All rights reserved."
                }
            },
            en: {
                direction: "ltr",
                font: "sans-serif",
                alignClass: "lg:text-left",
                btnAlign: "lg:justify-start",
                hero: {
                    tagline: "Your Comprehensive Guide to Educational AI",
                    titleHtml: `Master <span class="text-blue-600">Google NotebookLM</span><br />From Zero to Hero`,
                    desc: "A practical training platform for teachers and content creators to use NotebookLM for research, summarization, and creating smart educational models efficiently.",
                    ctaPrimary: "Download PowerPoint",
                    ctaSecondary: "Watch Intro Video",
                    videoCaption: "Watch the Full Guide (Video Demo)",
                    videoSrc: "Media/video-en.mp4",
                    videoPoster: "Media/poster-en.png"
                },
                about: {
                    title: "What is NotebookLM? And why does it change learning?",
                    p1: "It's not just a search engine, but an AI-powered research, teaching, and summarization assistant from Google. Unlike traditional search engines that give you links, NotebookLM becomes an expert in only the documents you upload.",
                    p2: "This shift from 'general search' to 'personalized grounded search' helps teachers and researchers build reliable project notebooks, summarize complex books in seconds, and transform raw scientific material into study guides, quizzes, and accurate summaries without the usual AI 'hallucinations'."
                },
                features: {
                    pill: "Powerful Features",
                    title: "Key Features & Updates in NotebookLM",
                    items: [
                        { title: "Project Notebooks", desc: "Separate workspace for each project to organize sources and focus.", example: "Create a separate notebook for each subject or research paper.", icon: "book-open", color: "text-blue-600" },
                        { title: "Auto-chunking & Indexing", desc: "Automatic understanding and splitting of sources to find info quickly.", example: "Use this to split a curriculum book into ready-made study units.", icon: "layers", color: "text-purple-600" },
                        { title: "Smart Citations", desc: "Answers backed by digital citations for instant source verification.", example: "Verify research accuracy by jumping to the original paragraph with one click.", icon: "quote", color: "text-green-600" },
                        { title: "Guided Mind Maps", desc: "Transforming scientific material into visual charts to understand connections.", example: "Ask the system to draw a concept map for the first chapter.", icon: "layout", color: "text-orange-600" },
                        { title: "Multi-modal Sources", desc: "Support for PDF, Google Docs, website links, copied text, and videos.", example: "Combine a YouTube tutorial with a PDF curriculum in one place.", icon: "video", color: "text-red-600" },
                        { title: "Timeline Mode", desc: "Create a timeline for the evolution of concepts and historical events.", example: "Automatically arrange historical events mentioned in the book.", icon: "clock", color: "text-indigo-600" },
                        { title: "Schema Extraction", desc: "Automatic identification of recurring themes to build a knowledge structure.", example: "Extract the periodic table or chemical equations as a separate list.", icon: "search", color: "text-teal-600" },
                        { title: "Slide Generation", desc: "Convert notes and summaries into ready-made presentation slides.", example: "Convert the lesson summary into a presentation for class.", icon: "file-text", color: "text-pink-600" },
                        { title: "Auto-Glossary", desc: "Create a glossary of key terms with their definitions.", example: "Generate a glossary for students at the end of the unit.", icon: "book-open", color: "text-yellow-600" },

                },

                        { title: "Content Creators", desc: "To turn long research into video scripts and articles.", icon: "share-2" },
                        { title: "Researchers & Students", desc: "To review literature and extract precise information.", icon: "search" }
                    ]
                },
                faq: {
                    title: "Frequently Asked Questions",
                    items: [
                        { question: "Is NotebookLM free?", answer: "Yes, the tool is currently available for free from Google and only requires a Google account to access." },

                        { question: "Can I export summaries?", answer: "Yes, you can copy text or convert notes to Google Docs and export them." }
                    ]
                },
                footer: {
                    desc: "Midade AI specializes in comprehensive AI services, focusing on the Arabic language and MENA market needs, offering a wide range of AI-powered tools and solutions.",
                    whatsapp: "Contact us via WhatsApp",
                    twitter: "Follow us on X (Twitter)",

        // State
        let currentLang = 'ar';

        // Initialization
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            renderPage();
        });

        function toggleLanguage() {
            currentLang = currentLang === 'ar' ? 'en' : 'ar';
            renderPage();
        }

        function renderPage() {
            const t = content[currentLang];
            const isRTL = currentLang === 'ar';

            const videoEl = document.querySelector("video");
            videoEl.src = t.hero.videoSrc;
            videoEl.poster = t.hero.videoPoster;
            videoEl.load();

            document.querySelector('#infographic-title').textContent = t.infographic.title;
            document.querySelector('#infographic-desc').textContent = t.infographic.desc;
            document.querySelector('.group img').src = t.infographic.imageSrc;
            document.querySelector('#image-modal img').src = t.infographic.imageSrc;

            document.querySelector('#ppt-download a').href = t.ppt.fileSrc;

            // Global settings
            document.documentElement.lang = currentLang;
            document.documentElement.dir = t.direction;
            document.body.style.fontFamily = t.font;
            
            // Navbar
            document.getElementById('lang-btn-text').textContent = isRTL ? 'English' : 'العربية';

            // Hero
            document.getElementById('hero-tagline').textContent = t.hero.tagline;
            document.getElementById('hero-title').innerHTML = t.hero.titleHtml;
            document.getElementById('hero-desc').textContent = t.hero.desc;
            document.getElementById('cta-primary').textContent = t.hero.ctaPrimary;
            document.getElementById('cta-secondary').innerHTML = `<i data-lucide="play" class="w-5 h-5 fill-current ${!isRTL ? 'rotate-180' : ''}"></i> ${t.hero.ctaSecondary}`;
            document.getElementById('video-caption').textContent = t.hero.videoCaption;

            // Adjust layout classes based on language
            const heroTextContainer = document.getElementById('hero-text-container');
            const heroButtons = document.getElementById('hero-buttons');
            const footerInfoContainer = document.getElementById('footer-info-container');
            const footerContacts = document.getElementById('footer-contacts');

            if (isRTL) {
                heroTextContainer.className = "lg:w-1/2 text-center lg:text-right space-y-6";
                heroButtons.className = "flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 justify-center lg:justify-start pt-4";
                
                // Footer RTL Alignment
                footerInfoContainer.className = "w-full md:w-1/2 space-y-6 text-center md:text-right";
                footerContacts.className = "w-full md:w-1/2 flex flex-col items-center md:items-end gap-4";
                
                // PPT Decorations
                document.getElementById('ppt-deco-1').className = "absolute top-0 right-0 -mr-20 -mt-20 w-64 h-64 rounded-full bg-white opacity-10";
                document.getElementById('ppt-deco-2').className = "absolute bottom-0 left-0 -ml-20 -mb-20 w-80 h-80 rounded-full bg-white opacity-10";

                // Close Modal Btn Position
                document.getElementById('modal-close-btn').className = "absolute top-6 left-6 text-white p-2 hover:bg-white hover:bg-opacity-20 rounded-full transition";
            } else {
                heroTextContainer.className = "lg:w-1/2 text-center lg:text-left space-y-6";
                heroButtons.className = "flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 justify-center lg:justify-start pt-4";
                
                // Footer LTR Alignment
                footerInfoContainer.className = "w-full md:w-1/2 space-y-6 text-center md:text-left";
                footerContacts.className = "w-full md:w-1/2 flex flex-col items-center md:items-end gap-4"; 

                // PPT Decorations
                document.getElementById('ppt-deco-1').className = "absolute top-0 left-0 -ml-20 -mt-20 w-64 h-64 rounded-full bg-white opacity-10";
                document.getElementById('ppt-deco-2').className = "absolute bottom-0 right-0 -mr-20 -mb-20 w-80 h-80 rounded-full bg-white opacity-10";

                 // Close Modal Btn Position
                 document.getElementById('modal-close-btn').className = "absolute top-6 right-6 text-white p-2 hover:bg-white hover:bg-opacity-20 rounded-full transition";
            }

            // About
            document.getElementById('about-title').textContent = t.about.title;
            document.getElementById('about-p1').textContent = t.about.p1;
            document.getElementById('about-p2').textContent = t.about.p2;

            // Features
            document.getElementById('features-pill').textContent = t.features.pill;
            document.getElementById('features-title').textContent = t.features.title;
            
            const featuresContainer = document.getElementById('features-grid');
            featuresContainer.innerHTML = t.features.items.map(feature => `
                <div class="bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition border border-gray-100 flex flex-col h-full">
                    <div class="mb-4 bg-gray-50 w-12 h-12 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                        <i data-lucide="${feature.icon}" class="w-6 h-6 ${feature.color}"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-3 text-gray-900">${feature.title}</h3>
                    <p class="text-gray-600 mb-4 text-sm leading-relaxed flex-grow">
                        ${feature.desc}
                    </p>
                    <div class="mt-auto bg-blue-50 p-3 rounded-lg text-xs text-blue-800 flex items-start gap-2">
                        <i data-lucide="check" class="w-4 h-4 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0"></i>
                        <span>${feature.example}</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            // PPT
            document.getElementById('ppt-title').textContent = t.ppt.title;
            document.getElementById('ppt-desc').textContent = t.ppt.desc;
            document.getElementById('ppt-button').textContent = t.ppt.button;
            document.getElementById('ppt-meta').textContent = t.ppt.meta;

            // Infographic
            document.getElementById('infographic-title').textContent = t.infographic.title;
            document.getElementById('infographic-desc').textContent = t.infographic.desc;

            // Audience
            document.getElementById('audience-title').textContent = t.audience.title;
            const audienceContainer = document.getElementById('audience-grid');
            audienceContainer.innerHTML = t.audience.items.map(item => `
                <div class="bg-white p-6 rounded-xl shadow-sm text-center border-t-4 border-blue-500 hover:-translate-y-1 transition duration-300">
                    <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-blue-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4 text-blue-600">
                        <i data-lucide="${item.icon}" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-lg mb-2">${item.title}</h3>
                    <p class="text-gray-600 text-sm">${item.desc}</p>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            // FAQ
            document.getElementById('faq-title').textContent = t.faq.title;
            const faqContainer = document.getElementById('faq-list');
            faqContainer.innerHTML = t.faq.items.map((faq, index) => `
                <div class="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
                    <button onclick="toggleAccordion(${index})" class="w-full flex items-center justify-between p-5 bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100 transition ${isRTL ? 'text-right' : 'text-left'}">
                        <span class="font-bold text-gray-800">${faq.question}</span>
                        <i id="chevron-${index}" data-lucide="chevron-down" class="w-5 h-5 text-gray-500 chevron"></i>
                    </button>
                    <div id="accordion-${index}" class="accordion-content">
                        <div class="p-5 bg-white text-gray-600 border-t border-gray-100 leading-relaxed">
                            ${faq.answer}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `).join('');

            // Footer
            document.getElementById('footer-desc').textContent = t.footer.desc;
            document.getElementById('footer-whatsapp-text').textContent = t.footer.whatsapp;
            document.getElementById('footer-twitter-text').textContent = t.footer.twitter;
            document.getElementById('footer-email-text').textContent = t.footer.email;
            document.getElementById('footer-copyright').textContent = t.footer.copyright;

            // Refresh Icons
            lucide.createIcons();
        }

        // Accordion Logic
        function toggleAccordion(index) {
            const content = document.getElementById(`accordion-${index}`);
            const chevron = document.getElementById(`chevron-${index}`);
            
            if (content.classList.contains('active')) {
                content.classList.remove('active');
                chevron.classList.remove('rotate');
            } else {
                // Close all others first
                document.querySelectorAll('.accordion-content').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
                document.querySelectorAll('.chevron').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('rotate'));

                content.classList.add('active');
                chevron.classList.add('rotate');
            }
        }

        // Modal Logic
        function openModal() {
            document.getElementById('image-modal').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('image-modal').classList.add('flex');
        }

        function closeModal() {
            document.getElementById('image-modal').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('image-modal').classList.remove('flex');
        }
    </script>

</body></html>
